message:
🌱 jaeger: Jaeger Agent metrics not returned (#1228)

* 🌱 Add jaeger: Jaeger Agent metrics not returned mission

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: correct jaeger namespace to observability

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,76 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "jaeger-738-jaeger-agent-metrics-not-returned",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "jaeger: Jaeger Agent metrics not returned",
+    "description": "Jaeger Agent metrics not returned. This issue affects 7+ users.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify jaeger troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your jaeger deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n observability -l app.kubernetes.io/name=jaeger\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=jaeger -n observability --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review jaeger configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant jaeger configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n observability -l app.kubernetes.io/name=jaeger\nkubectl get configmap -n observability -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=jaeger\n```\nAs per the [documentation](http://jaeger.readthedocs.io/en/latest/monitoring/) the Jaeger Agent should expose some metrics properly formatted for  Prometheus on `:5778/metrics` \n\nThe Agent is started using:\n```\ndocker run \\\n  --rm \\\n "
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Jaeger Agent metrics not returned",
+        "description": "This will fix #738 \n\nI'm looking at adding a test to ensure the functionality will stay over time. I'll update the PR\n```yaml\ndocker run \\\n  --rm \\\n  -p5775:5775/udp \\\n  -p6831:6831/udp \\\n  -p6832:6832/udp \\\n  -p5778:5778/tcp \\\n  jaegertracing/jaeger-agent:1.2 \\\n  /go/bin/agent-linux --collector.host-port=my-collector:some-port\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm Jaeger Agent metrics not returned is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=jaeger -n observability --tail=50 --since=5m\nkubectl get events -n observability --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "This will fix #738 \n\nI'm looking at adding a test to ensure the functionality will stay over time. I'll update the PR",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "docker run \\\n  --rm \\\n  -p5775:5775/udp \\\n  -p6831:6831/udp \\\n  -p6832:6832/udp \\\n  -p5778:5778/tcp \\\n  jaegertracing/jaeger-agent:1.2 \\\n  /go/bin/agent-linux --collector.host-port=my-collector:some-port",
+        "curl -v localhost:5778/metrics\n*   Trying ::1...\n* TCP_NODELAY set\n* Connected to localhost (::1) port 5778 (#0)\n> GET /metrics HTTP/1.1\n> Host: localhost:5778\n> User-Agent: curl/7.54.0\n> Accept: */*\n> \n< HTTP/1.1 400 Bad Request\n< Content-Type: text/plain; charset=utf-8\n< X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff\n< Date: Wed, 14 Mar 2018 15:35:50 GMT\n< Content-Length: 42\n< \n'service' parameter must be provided once"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "jaeger",
+      "graduated",
+      "observability",
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "jaeger"
+    ],

+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "graduated",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/jaegertracing/jaeger/issues/738",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/jaegertracing/jaeger",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/jaegertracing/jaeger/pull/739"
+    },
+    "reactions": 7,

+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },

+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",

+      "kubectl"
+    ],

+  },
